## TL;DR
The hypothesis fails on the production-load case — measurements at 10× throughput
show the predicted invariant breaks under contention.
[stance: refutes]
[source-kind: counter-example]

## Argument
Verifier emitted `refutes` (illegal per Inquiry per-role mutex: V→{supports,inconclusive}).
This fixture tests that the narrowed whitelist filter catches the violation.
